mapper.sql: SELECT /*+ RESULT_CACHE */ AAAA.yy, AAAA.dscfc_lclhq_cd, AAAA.dscfc_lclhq_nm, AAAA.dscfc_bplc_cd, AAAA.dscfc_bplc_nm, AAAA.dscfc_id, MAX(AAAA.dscfc_nm) AS dscfc_nm, AAAA.dscfc_procs_ty_cd, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '01', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS jan, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '02', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS feb, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '03', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS mar, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '04', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS apr, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '05', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS may, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '06', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS jun, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '07', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS jul, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '08', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS agu, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '09', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS sep, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '10', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS oct, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '11', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS nov, NVL(ROUND(SUM(DECODE(SUBSTR(AAAA.dscfc_use_de, 5, 2), '12', AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty)), 0), 0) AS dec, NVL(SUM(AAAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty) ,0) AS tot_usgqty FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(BBB AAA) */ SUBSTR(AAA.dscfc_use_de, 0, 4) AS yy, AS dscfc_lclhq_cd, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd = 'GHG_1001' AND cmmn_cd = ) AS dscfc_lclhq_nm, BBB.dscfc_bplc_cd, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd = 'GHG_1002' AND cmmn_cd = BBB.dscfc_bplc_cd ) AS dscfc_bplc_nm, BBB.dscfc_id, BBB.dscfc_nm, BBB.dscfc_procs_ty_cd, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd LIKE 'GHG_0024' AND cmmn_cd = BBB.dscfc_procs_ty_cd ) AS dscfc_procs_ty_nm, BBB.dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd = 'GHG_0005' AND cmmn_cd = BBB.dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd ) AS dscfc_use_fuel_div_nm, AAA.dscfc_use_de, AAA.sum_dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de, MAX(ABC.usgqty) AS sum_dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, CASE WHEN AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') THEN MAX(AA.dscfc_usgqty) END AS usgqty FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ A.dscfc_id, A.dscfc_use_de, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm, A.dscfc_usgqty FROM GHG.tm_rq01103 A, GHG.tm_gg01104 B WHERE ( (A.dscfc_use_slip_no IS NOT NULL AND A.dscfc_use_slip_no NOT LIKE 'TMP%') OR A.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd = '1' ) AND A.dscfc_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '0101' AND SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4) || '1231' AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id = B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id ) AA GROUP BY AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm ) ABC GROUP BY ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de ) AAA, ( SELECT dscfc_id, dscfc_nm, dscfc_lclhq_cd, dscfc_bplc_cd, dscfc_procs_ty_cd, dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd FROM GHG.tm_gg01101 WHERE dscfc_use_yn = '1' AND dscfc_regist_stat_div_cd = '1' AND dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd = '61' /* 전기 */ AND dscfc_lclhq_cd != '88888888' /* 위탁 */ ) BBB WHERE BBB.dscfc_id = AAA.dscfc_id(+) ) AAAA GROUP BY AAAA.yy, AAAA.dscfc_lclhq_cd, AAAA.dscfc_lclhq_nm, AAAA.dscfc_bplc_cd, AAAA.dscfc_bplc_nm, AAAA.dscfc_id, AAAA.dscfc_procs_ty_cd, AAAA.dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd
mapper.select:
/* TM_EC42001_Dao_retrieveRe100List */ WITH MAPPING_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ '0' AS seq, 'RE100 이행률' AS setcsc_nm, 'RE100 이행률' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'RE100 이행률(누적)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '1' AS seq, 'RE100 이행률' AS setcsc_nm, 'RE100 이행률' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'RE100 이행률(월별)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '2' AS seq, '전력소비량(합계)' AS setcsc_nm, '전력소비량(합계)' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, '소비량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '3' AS seq, '발전량(합계)' AS setcsc_nm, '발전량(합계)' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '4' AS seq, '발전량(합계)' AS setcsc_nm, '발전량(합계)' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '5' AS seq, '발전량(합계)' AS setcsc_nm, '발전량(합계)' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '6' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '소양강' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '110110' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '7' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '소양강' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '110110' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '8' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '소양강' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '110110' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '9' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '충주' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '110210' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '10' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '충주' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '110210' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '11' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '충주' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '110210' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '12' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '대청' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '210310' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '13' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '대청' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '210310' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '14' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '대청' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '210310' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '15' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '용담' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '210410' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '16' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '용담' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '210410' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '17' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '용담' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '210410' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '18' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '주암' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '310510' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '19' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '주암' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '310510' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '20' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '주암' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '310510' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '21' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '임하' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410610' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '22' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '임하' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410610' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '23' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '임하' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410610' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '24' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '안동' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410710' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '25' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '안동' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410710' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '26' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '안동' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410710' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '27' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '합천' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410810' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '28' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '합천' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410810' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '29' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '합천' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410810' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '30' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '남강' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410910' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '31' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '남강' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410910' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS iem_nm, 'REC발급량' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '32' AS seq, '대수력' AS setcsc_nm, '남강' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '410910' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'issQy' AS iem_nm, '재생에너지사용확인서 발급량 (MWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '33' AS seq, '태양광' AS setcsc_nm, '-' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '999999' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, 'elyrsQy' AS iem_nm, '발전량(kWh)' AS iem_cd FROM dual ), RE100_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1, usr_dfn_vu2, usr_dfn_vu3, usr_dfn_vu4, usr_dfn_vu5 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2012' ORDER BY sort_ordr ), CFCNT_LIST AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(mt, 0, 4) AS yy, SUBSTR(mt, 5, 2) AS mt, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, CASE WHEN TRIM(usr_dfn_vu1) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(usr_dfn_vu4) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(usr_dfn_vu5) IS NOT NULL AND usr_dfn_vu4 <= mt THEN TO_NUMBER(usr_dfn_vu5) WHEN TRIM(usr_dfn_vu1) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(usr_dfn_vu2) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(usr_dfn_vu3) IS NOT NULL AND usr_dfn_vu2 <= mt THEN TO_NUMBER(usr_dfn_vu3) WHEN TRIM(usr_dfn_vu1) IS NOT NULL THEN TO_NUMBER(usr_dfn_vu1) ELSE NULL END AS cfcnt FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1, usr_dfn_vu2, usr_dfn_vu3, usr_dfn_vu4, usr_dfn_vu5 FROM RE100_LIST ) A, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '01', 'yyyyMM'), LEVEL - 2), 'yyyyMM') AS mt FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4) || '12', 'yyyyMM'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '01', 'yyyyMM')) + 2 ) B ), DATA_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ re100_year, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, iem_nm, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu FROM tm_ec42001 WHERE re100_year = SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) ), CNSTQY_DATA_LIST AS ( /* 전력소비량 */ SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ '2' AS seq, '전력소비량(합계)' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, ROUND(SUM(tot_usgqty), 0) AS sum, ROUND(SUM(jan), 1) AS mon01_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(feb), 1) AS mon02_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mar), 1) AS mon03_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(apr), 1) AS mon04_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(may), 1) AS mon05_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(jun), 1) AS mon06_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(jul), 1) AS mon07_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(agu), 1) AS mon08_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(sep), 1) AS mon09_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(oct), 1) AS mon10_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(nov), 1) AS mon11_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(dec), 1) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM (
) ), ELCPWSTN_ELYRS_DATA_LIST AS ( /* 대수력 발전량: 신재생에너지 공급의무화제도(RPS) 종합지원시스템 데이터 수기입력 */ SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ TO_CHAR(A.sort_ordr * 3 - 2) AS seq, A.cmmn_cd_nm AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, A.cmmn_cd AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, ROUND(( NVL(mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon12_iem_vu, 0) ), 0) AS sum, B.mon01_iem_vu, B.mon02_iem_vu, B.mon03_iem_vu, B.mon04_iem_vu, B.mon05_iem_vu, B.mon06_iem_vu, B.mon07_iem_vu, B.mon08_iem_vu, B.mon09_iem_vu, B.mon10_iem_vu, B.mon11_iem_vu, B.mon12_iem_vu FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr FROM RE100_LIST UNION ALL SELECT '999999' AS cmmn_cd, '태양광' AS cmmn_cd_nm, 10 AS sort_ordr FROM dual ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT re100_year, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, iem_nm, ROUND(SUM(mon01_iem_vu), 1) AS mon01_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon02_iem_vu), 1) AS mon02_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon03_iem_vu), 1) AS mon03_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon04_iem_vu), 1) AS mon04_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon05_iem_vu), 1) AS mon05_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon06_iem_vu), 1) AS mon06_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon07_iem_vu), 1) AS mon07_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon08_iem_vu), 1) AS mon08_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon09_iem_vu), 1) AS mon09_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon10_iem_vu), 1) AS mon10_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon11_iem_vu), 1) AS mon11_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon12_iem_vu), 1) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM DATA_INIT_LIST WHERE iem_nm = 'elyrsQy' GROUP BY re100_year, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, iem_nm ) B ON A.cmmn_cd = B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd ), ELCPWSTN_REC_DATA_LIST AS ( /* 대수력 REC 발급량: ROUNDDOWN[발전량(MWh) * REC가중치(1.5) + {전월 발전량(MWh) * REC가중치(1.5) - TRUNC(전월 발전량(MWh) * REC가중치(1.5))}] */ SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ seq, ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, ROUND(( NVL(mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(mon12_iem_vu, 0) ), 0) AS sum, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A B) */ TO_CHAR(A.sort_ordr * 3 - 1) AS seq, A.cmmn_cd_nm AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, A.cmmn_cd AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, FLOOR((B.mon01_iem_vu * mon01_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.pre_mon12_iem_vu * pre_mon12_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.pre_mon12_iem_vu * pre_mon12_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon01_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon02_iem_vu * mon02_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon01_iem_vu * mon01_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon01_iem_vu * mon01_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon02_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon03_iem_vu * mon03_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon02_iem_vu * mon02_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon02_iem_vu * mon02_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon03_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon04_iem_vu * mon04_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon03_iem_vu * mon03_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon03_iem_vu * mon03_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon04_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon05_iem_vu * mon05_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon04_iem_vu * mon04_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon04_iem_vu * mon04_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon05_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon06_iem_vu * mon06_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon05_iem_vu * mon05_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon05_iem_vu * mon05_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon06_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon07_iem_vu * mon07_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon06_iem_vu * mon06_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon06_iem_vu * mon06_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon07_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon08_iem_vu * mon08_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon07_iem_vu * mon07_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon07_iem_vu * mon07_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon08_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon09_iem_vu * mon09_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon08_iem_vu * mon08_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon08_iem_vu * mon08_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon09_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon10_iem_vu * mon10_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon09_iem_vu * mon09_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon09_iem_vu * mon09_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon10_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon11_iem_vu * mon11_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon10_iem_vu * mon10_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon10_iem_vu * mon10_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon11_iem_vu, FLOOR((B.mon12_iem_vu * mon12_iem_vu_cfcnt) + ((B.mon11_iem_vu * mon11_iem_vu_cfcnt) - TRUNC(B.mon11_iem_vu * mon11_iem_vu_cfcnt))) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr FROM RE100_LIST ) A, ( SELECT A.re100_year, A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, A.iem_nm, A.pre_mon12_iem_vu, A.mon01_iem_vu, A.mon02_iem_vu, A.mon03_iem_vu, A.mon04_iem_vu, A.mon05_iem_vu, A.mon06_iem_vu, A.mon07_iem_vu, A.mon08_iem_vu, A.mon09_iem_vu, A.mon10_iem_vu, A.mon11_iem_vu, A.mon12_iem_vu, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND (TO_NUMBER(A.re100_year) - 1) = B.yy AND B.mt = '12' ), 1.5) AS pre_mon12_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '01' ), 1.5) AS mon01_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '02' ), 1.5) AS mon02_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '03' ), 1.5) AS mon03_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '04' ), 1.5) AS mon04_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '05' ), 1.5) AS mon05_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '06' ), 1.5) AS mon06_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '07' ), 1.5) AS mon07_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '08' ), 1.5) AS mon08_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '09' ), 1.5) AS mon09_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '10' ), 1.5) AS mon10_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '11' ), 1.5) AS mon11_iem_vu_cfcnt, NVL(( SELECT cfcnt FROM CFCNT_LIST B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd AND A.re100_year = B.yy AND B.mt = '12' ), 1.5) AS mon12_iem_vu_cfcnt FROM ( SELECT re100_year, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, iem_nm, NVL(( SELECT SUM(mon12_iem_vu) FROM tm_ec42001 WHERE re100_year = (DATA_INIT_LIST.re100_year - 1) AND ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = DATA_INIT_LIST.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd AND iem_nm = DATA_INIT_LIST.iem_nm ), 0) AS pre_mon12_iem_vu, ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon01_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon01_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon02_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon02_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon03_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon03_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon04_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon04_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon05_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon05_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon06_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon06_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon07_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon07_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon08_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon08_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon09_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon09_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon10_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon10_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon11_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon11_iem_vu, /* kWh => mWh */ ROUND(NVL(SUM(mon12_iem_vu / 1000), 0), 1) AS mon12_iem_vu /* kWh => mWh */ FROM DATA_INIT_LIST WHERE iem_nm = 'elyrsQy' GROUP BY re100_year, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, iem_nm ) A ) B WHERE A.cmmn_cd = B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd ) ), ELCPWSTN_ISS_DATA_LIST AS ( /* 재생에너지사용확인서 발급량: K-RE100 관리 시스템 데이터 수기입력 */ SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ TO_CHAR(A.sort_ordr * 3) AS seq, A.cmmn_cd_nm AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, A.cmmn_cd AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, ROUND(( NVL(B.mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon12_iem_vu, 0) ), 0) AS sum, B.mon01_iem_vu, B.mon02_iem_vu, B.mon03_iem_vu, B.mon04_iem_vu, B.mon05_iem_vu, B.mon06_iem_vu, B.mon07_iem_vu, B.mon08_iem_vu, B.mon09_iem_vu, B.mon10_iem_vu, B.mon11_iem_vu, B.mon12_iem_vu FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr FROM RE100_LIST ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT re100_year, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, iem_nm, ROUND(SUM(mon01_iem_vu), 1) AS mon01_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon02_iem_vu), 1) AS mon02_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon03_iem_vu), 1) AS mon03_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon04_iem_vu), 1) AS mon04_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon05_iem_vu), 1) AS mon05_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon06_iem_vu), 1) AS mon06_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon07_iem_vu), 1) AS mon07_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon08_iem_vu), 1) AS mon08_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon09_iem_vu), 1) AS mon09_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon10_iem_vu), 1) AS mon10_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon11_iem_vu), 1) AS mon11_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon12_iem_vu), 1) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM DATA_INIT_LIST WHERE iem_nm = 'issQy' GROUP BY re100_year, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, iem_nm ) B ON A.cmmn_cd = B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd ), ELYRS_QY_DATA_LIST AS ( /* 발전량(kWh): 대수력 발전량 + 자가소비 발전량 합계 */ SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ seq, '발전량(합계)' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, SUM(sum) AS sum, SUM(mon01_iem_vu) AS mon01_iem_vu, SUM(mon02_iem_vu) AS mon02_iem_vu, SUM(mon03_iem_vu) AS mon03_iem_vu, SUM(mon04_iem_vu) AS mon04_iem_vu, SUM(mon05_iem_vu) AS mon05_iem_vu, SUM(mon06_iem_vu) AS mon06_iem_vu, SUM(mon07_iem_vu) AS mon07_iem_vu, SUM(mon08_iem_vu) AS mon08_iem_vu, SUM(mon09_iem_vu) AS mon09_iem_vu, SUM(mon10_iem_vu) AS mon10_iem_vu, SUM(mon11_iem_vu) AS mon11_iem_vu, SUM(mon12_iem_vu) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM ( SELECT '3' AS seq, sum, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu FROM ELCPWSTN_ELYRS_DATA_LIST UNION ALL SELECT '4' AS seq, sum, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu FROM ELCPWSTN_REC_DATA_LIST UNION ALL SELECT '5' AS seq, sum, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu FROM ELCPWSTN_ISS_DATA_LIST ) GROUP BY seq ), RE100_MON_DATA_LIST AS ( /* RE100 이행률(월별): 발전량 / 소비량(합계) */ SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ '1' AS seq, 'RE100 이행률' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.sum, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS sum, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon01_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon01_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon02_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon02_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon03_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon03_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon04_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon04_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon05_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon05_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon06_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon06_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon07_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon07_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon08_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon08_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon09_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon09_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon10_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon10_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon11_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon11_iem_vu, CASE WHEN CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum IS NULL OR CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(A.mon12_iem_vu, 0) / CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum * 100, 3) END AS mon12_iem_vu FROM CNSTQY_DATA_LIST, ( SELECT sum, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu FROM ELYRS_QY_DATA_LIST WHERE seq = '3' ) A ), RE100_ACML_DATA_LIST AS ( /* RE100 이행률(누적): 전월 RE100 이행률(월별) + RE100 이행률(월별) */ SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ '0' AS seq, 'RE100 이행률' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, '' AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, /* ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu + mon06_iem_vu + mon07_iem_vu + mon08_iem_vu + mon09_iem_vu + mon10_iem_vu + mon11_iem_vu + mon12_iem_vu ) AS sum, */ sum, mon01_iem_vu AS mon01_iem_vu, (mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu) AS mon02_iem_vu, (mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu) AS mon03_iem_vu, (mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu) AS mon04_iem_vu, ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu ) AS mon05_iem_vu, ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu + mon06_iem_vu ) AS mon06_iem_vu, ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu + mon06_iem_vu + mon07_iem_vu ) AS mon07_iem_vu, ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu + mon06_iem_vu + mon07_iem_vu + mon08_iem_vu ) AS mon08_iem_vu, ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu + mon06_iem_vu + mon07_iem_vu + mon08_iem_vu + mon09_iem_vu ) AS mon09_iem_vu, ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu + mon06_iem_vu + mon07_iem_vu + mon08_iem_vu + mon09_iem_vu + mon10_iem_vu ) AS mon10_iem_vu, ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu + mon06_iem_vu + mon07_iem_vu + mon08_iem_vu + mon09_iem_vu + mon10_iem_vu + mon11_iem_vu ) AS mon11_iem_vu, ( mon01_iem_vu + mon02_iem_vu + mon03_iem_vu + mon04_iem_vu + mon05_iem_vu + mon06_iem_vu + mon07_iem_vu + mon08_iem_vu + mon09_iem_vu + mon10_iem_vu + mon11_iem_vu + mon12_iem_vu ) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM RE100_MON_DATA_LIST ) SELECT /*+ LEADING(MAPPING_LIST A) */ SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) AS re100_year, TO_NUMBER(MAPPING_LIST.seq) AS seq, MAPPING_LIST.setcsc_nm, NVL(A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, MAPPING_LIST.ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm) AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, NVL(A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, MAPPING_LIST.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd) AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, MAPPING_LIST.iem_cd, MAPPING_LIST.iem_nm, A.sum, A.mon01_iem_vu, A.mon02_iem_vu, A.mon03_iem_vu, A.mon04_iem_vu, A.mon05_iem_vu, A.mon06_iem_vu, A.mon07_iem_vu, A.mon08_iem_vu, A.mon09_iem_vu, A.mon10_iem_vu, A.mon11_iem_vu, A.mon12_iem_vu FROM MAPPING_LIST, ( SELECT seq, ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, TO_CHAR(ROUND(sum, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS sum, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon01_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon01_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon02_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon02_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon03_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon03_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon04_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon04_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon05_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon05_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon06_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon06_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon07_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon07_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon08_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon08_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon09_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon09_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon10_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon10_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon11_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon11_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon12_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon12_iem_vu FROM RE100_ACML_DATA_LIST UNION ALL SELECT seq, ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, '' AS sum, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon01_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon01_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon02_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon02_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon03_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon03_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon04_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon04_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon05_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon05_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon06_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon06_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon07_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon07_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon08_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon08_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon09_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon09_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon10_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon10_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon11_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon11_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(ROUND(mon12_iem_vu, 1), 'FM999,999,990.0') || '%' AS mon12_iem_vu FROM RE100_MON_DATA_LIST UNION ALL SELECT seq, ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, TO_CHAR(sum) AS sum, TO_CHAR(mon01_iem_vu) AS mon01_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon02_iem_vu) AS mon02_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon03_iem_vu) AS mon03_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon04_iem_vu) AS mon04_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon05_iem_vu) AS mon05_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon06_iem_vu) AS mon06_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon07_iem_vu) AS mon07_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon08_iem_vu) AS mon08_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon09_iem_vu) AS mon09_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon10_iem_vu) AS mon10_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon11_iem_vu) AS mon11_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon12_iem_vu) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM CNSTQY_DATA_LIST UNION ALL SELECT seq, ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, TO_CHAR(sum) AS sum, TO_CHAR(mon01_iem_vu) AS mon01_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon02_iem_vu) AS mon02_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon03_iem_vu) AS mon03_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon04_iem_vu) AS mon04_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon05_iem_vu) AS mon05_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon06_iem_vu) AS mon06_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon07_iem_vu) AS mon07_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon08_iem_vu) AS mon08_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon09_iem_vu) AS mon09_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon10_iem_vu) AS mon10_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon11_iem_vu) AS mon11_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon12_iem_vu) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM ELYRS_QY_DATA_LIST UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(seq) + 5) AS seq, ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, TO_CHAR(sum) AS sum, TO_CHAR(mon01_iem_vu) AS mon01_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon02_iem_vu) AS mon02_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon03_iem_vu) AS mon03_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon04_iem_vu) AS mon04_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon05_iem_vu) AS mon05_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon06_iem_vu) AS mon06_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon07_iem_vu) AS mon07_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon08_iem_vu) AS mon08_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon09_iem_vu) AS mon09_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon10_iem_vu) AS mon10_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon11_iem_vu) AS mon11_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon12_iem_vu) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM ( SELECT seq, ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, TO_CHAR(sum) AS sum, TO_CHAR(mon01_iem_vu) AS mon01_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon02_iem_vu) AS mon02_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon03_iem_vu) AS mon03_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon04_iem_vu) AS mon04_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon05_iem_vu) AS mon05_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon06_iem_vu) AS mon06_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon07_iem_vu) AS mon07_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon08_iem_vu) AS mon08_iem_vu, seq, ecs_elcpwstn_div_nm, ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, TO_CHAR(sum) AS sum, TO_CHAR(mon01_iem_vu) AS mon01_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon02_iem_vu) AS mon02_iem_vu, TO_CHAR(mon03_iem_vu) AS mon03_iem_vu, mapper.update: /* TM_EC42001_Dao_saveRe100 */ MERGE INTO tm_ec42001 A USING ( SELECT #{re100Year} AS re100_year, #{ecsElcpwstnDivCd} AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, #{iemNm} AS iem_nm, #{mon01IemVu} AS mon01_iem_vu, #{mon02IemVu} AS mon02_iem_vu, #{mon03IemVu} AS mon03_iem_vu, #{mon04IemVu} AS mon04_iem_vu, #{mon05IemVu} AS mon05_iem_vu, #{mon06IemVu} AS mon06_iem_vu, #{mon07IemVu} AS mon07_iem_vu, #{mon08IemVu} AS mon08_iem_vu, #{mon09IemVu} AS mon09_iem_vu, #{mon10IemVu} AS mon10_iem_vu, #{mon11IemVu} AS mon11_iem_vu, #{mon12IemVu} AS mon12_iem_vu, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.re100_year = B.re100_year AND A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd AND A.iem_nm = B.iem_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.mon01_iem_vu = B.mon01_iem_vu, A.mon02_iem_vu = B.mon02_iem_vu, A.mon03_iem_vu = B.mon03_iem_vu, A.mon04_iem_vu = B.mon04_iem_vu, A.mon05_iem_vu = B.mon05_iem_vu, A.mon06_iem_vu = B.mon06_iem_vu, A.mon07_iem_vu = B.mon07_iem_vu, A.mon08_iem_vu = B.mon08_iem_vu, A.mon09_iem_vu = B.mon09_iem_vu, A.mon10_iem_vu = B.mon10_iem_vu, A.mon11_iem_vu = B.mon11_iem_vu, A.mon12_iem_vu = B.mon12_iem_vu, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.re100_year, A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, A.iem_nm, A.mon01_iem_vu, A.mon02_iem_vu, A.mon03_iem_vu, A.mon04_iem_vu, A.mon05_iem_vu, A.mon06_iem_vu, A.mon07_iem_vu, A.mon08_iem_vu, A.mon09_iem_vu, A.mon10_iem_vu, A.mon11_iem_vu, A.mon12_iem_vu, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.re100_year, B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, B.iem_nm, B.mon01_iem_vu, B.mon02_iem_vu, B.mon03_iem_vu, B.mon04_iem_vu, B.mon05_iem_vu, B.mon06_iem_vu, B.mon07_iem_vu, B.mon08_iem_vu, B.mon09_iem_vu, B.mon10_iem_vu, B.mon11_iem_vu, B.mon12_iem_vu, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
mapper.select:
/* TM_EC42001_Dao_retrieveRe100FlflList */ WITH YEAR_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + LEVEL - 1) AS yy FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4)) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + 1) ), CNSTQY_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ yy, ROUND(SUM(tot_usgqty), 0) AS sum, ROUND(SUM(jan), 0) AS mon01_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(feb), 0) AS mon02_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mar), 0) AS mon03_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(apr), 0) AS mon04_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(may), 0) AS mon05_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(jun), 0) AS mon06_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(jul), 0) AS mon07_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(agu), 0) AS mon08_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(sep), 0) AS mon09_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(oct), 0) AS mon10_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(nov), 0) AS mon11_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(dec), 0) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM (
) WHERE yy IS NOT NULL GROUP BY yy ), ELYRS_QY_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ re100_year, iem_nm, ROUND(SUM(mon01_iem_vu), 0) AS mon01_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon02_iem_vu), 0) AS mon02_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon03_iem_vu), 0) AS mon03_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon04_iem_vu), 0) AS mon04_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon05_iem_vu), 0) AS mon05_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon06_iem_vu), 0) AS mon06_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon07_iem_vu), 0) AS mon07_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon08_iem_vu), 0) AS mon08_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon09_iem_vu), 0) AS mon09_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon10_iem_vu), 0) AS mon10_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon11_iem_vu), 0) AS mon11_iem_vu, ROUND(SUM(mon12_iem_vu), 0) AS mon12_iem_vu FROM tm_ec42001 WHERE re100_year BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) AND ( SELECT MAX(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) AND iem_nm = 'elyrsQy' GROUP BY re100_year, iem_nm ) SELECT /*+ LEADING(YEAR_LIST A B) */ YEAR_LIST.yy AS re100_year, CASE WHEN B.sum IS NULL OR B.sum = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND((NVL(A.sum, 0) / B.sum) * 100, 1) END AS total FROM YEAR_LIST, ( SELECT re100_year, ( NVL(SUM(mon01_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon02_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon03_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon04_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon05_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon06_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon07_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon08_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon09_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon10_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon11_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon12_iem_vu), 0) ) AS sum FROM ELYRS_QY_DATA_LIST GROUP BY re100_year ) A, ( SELECT yy, ( NVL(SUM(mon01_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon02_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon03_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon04_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon05_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon06_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon07_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon08_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon09_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon10_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon11_iem_vu), 0) + NVL(SUM(mon12_iem_vu), 0) ) AS sum FROM CNSTQY_DATA_LIST GROUP BY yy ) B WHERE YEAR_LIST.yy = A.re100_year(+) AND YEAR_LIST.yy = B.yy(+) ORDER BY re100_year ASC
